name: medical-stats-research-assistant
description: Medical Statistics Research Assistant — unified pipeline: raw data → statistical report → (optional) submittable paper
author: boangus

/msra.name: MSRA Pipeline
/msra.description: Launch unified pipeline: data → stats report → (optional) paper track. Auto-detect entry point.

/msra-paper.name: MSRA Paper Track
/msra-paper.description: Enter Paper Track (Stage 5.0): convert stats report into a submittable paper via medical-pipeline. Requires completed Stage 4 with track=full_paper.

/msra-data.name: Data Preparation
/msra-data.description: Data validation, cleaning, and quality gate

/msra-explore.name: Exploratory Causal Analysis
/msra-explore.description: Data-driven exploratory causal analysis: discover potential causal structures, identify confounders, generate hypotheses

/msra-plan.name: Analysis Planning
/msra-plan.description: Create and review statistical analysis plan

/msra-calibrate.name: Calibration
/msra-calibrate.description: Run metric calibration against gold standard, or view calibration status

/msra-write.name: MSRA Paper Writing
/msra-write.description: Academic paper writing in 9 modes: abstract, citation-check, disclosure, format-convert, outline, plan, revision, revision-coach, lit-review

/msra-full.name: MSRA Full Pipeline
/msra-full.description: Full academic research pipeline: research → write → review → revise → finalize. Uses built-in medical-pipeline skill.

/msra-reviewer.name: MSRA Paper Reviewer
/msra-reviewer.description: Multi-perspective paper review (5 reviewers). Uses built-in peer-review skill.

/msra-modules.name: MSRA Modules
/msra-modules.description: Manage experimental modules (medical imaging, bioinformatics, realtime analytics). List modules, check dependencies, view status.
